creator: satosi.kimura@nifty.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #2)

> Do you want to be the maintainer of this port?
 I cannot decide now. I'll consider with reading

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html#maintain-port
and
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/

#0 > See maxima-5.45.1_1.log shown as attachment.
 Sorry, I failed to notice "Error" in this log.
There are something wrong concerned with pkg-plist.

 Probably, I'll modify it within this week.
